identity.name: Luna Group Venue Portal
identity.aesthetic: Dark Mode Glassmorphism with Neon Accents
identity.core_philosophy: The dashboard is the cockpit of the nightclub. It must feel like a premium tool—precise, beautiful, and fast.

usage_rules.headings: Use Chivo for all headings. Weight: 900 for KPIs, 700 for Section Titles. Tracking: -0.02em.
usage_rules.body: Use DM Sans for all UI text. Weight: 400 regular, 500 medium. Relaxed leading for readability.
usage_rules.data: Use JetBrains Mono for all numbers, IDs, and tabular data. This creates a 'technical' contrast to the luxury UI.

glassmorphism.default: backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
glassmorphism.heavy: backdrop-filter: blur(24px); background: rgba(5, 5, 5, 0.8); border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);

effects.noise: Always keep the .noise-overlay active in the root layout.
effects.glow: Use 'shadow-glow-red' for active states and critical KPIs.

cards.style: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-[#E31837]/30 transition-colors duration-300
cards.usage: Used for all dashboard widgets, auction items, and user profiles.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E31837] hover:bg-[#be152f] text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-bold tracking-wide shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(227,24,55,0.39)] transition ease-in-out duration-200 transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#272727] text-white hover:border-white/30 hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-muted-foreground hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-md px-4 py-2

inputs.style: bg-[#0F0F0F] border border-[#272727] focus:border-[#E31837] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E31837] rounded-lg h-10 px-4 text-white placeholder:text-neutral-600 transition-all duration-200

theme.tooltip: bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-lg shadow-2xl p-3

navigation.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar. Glass effect (heavy). Active item has a left border strip of color #E31837 and a subtle background glow.
navigation.mobile: Bottom fixed bar or slide-out drawer with heavy glass blur.

layout_strategy.dashboard_grid: Use a 'Bento' style masonry grid. Mix 1x1, 2x1, and 2x2 widgets. Gap: 6 (24px).
layout_strategy.spacing: Generous padding inside cards (p-6 or p-8). Tight gaps in data tables to maintain density.

icons.style: Stroke width: 1.5px. Size: 20px for UI, 24px for Nav, 32px for Features.

functionality_specs.overview: KPI Cards (Revenue, Visits, Active Auctions). Real-time 'Live Floor' activity feed.
functionality_specs.auctions: Grid of auction cards. Each card shows: Image, Title, Current Bid (animated), Time Left (countdown). 'Publish/Unpublish' toggle.
functionality_specs.users: Table with sortable columns. Click row to open 'User Profile Drawer' (Glass overlay).
functionality_specs.qr_scanner: Overlay modal with camera view. Success/Error states must be full-screen distinct colors (Green/Red) with vibration patterns.
functionality_specs.revenue: Area charts with gradient fills. Toggle between Daily/Weekly/Monthly.

universal_guidelines: Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications. Style them with a black background and red border.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
Do NOT use default HTML date pickers. Use custom Shadcn Popover + Calendar.
For the 'Glass' look, ensure the background image or gradient behind the glass elements is subtle enough to not interfere with text readability.
Animations: Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and layout changes (layoutId).
Accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratio is at least 4.5:1 on dark backgrounds.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-fidelity dashboard. Do not cut corners on the CSS. Use the 'glass' class liberally on containers. Implement the 'Overview', 'Auctions', 'Users', 'Revenue', 'Activity', and 'QR Scanner' pages. Ensure the 'Luna Red' brand color is the primary accent.
